name: io.github.mustafa-bharmal-shipveho/brainstack
description: Auditable, local-first memory recall for AI coding agents: hybrid (Qdrant + BM25) search over your own markdown brain, with provenance and a human review gate.

environmentVariables.name: BRAIN_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Path to your brain's memory directory (default: ~/.agent/memory).

environmentVariables.name: RECALL_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Force a retrieval mode: hybrid, dense, or sparse (BM25-only, no embedding model).
